title: Add syllabus tracker with chapters and study timer functionality

requirements.summary: Create syllabus tracker page displaying all user chapters with name, status badge, and individual study time
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays a list of all user chapters
Each chapter shows name, status badge (Pending or Completed), and study time
Status uses color coding consistent with existing theme (sage for completed, terracotta for pending)
Empty state message shown when user has no chapters

file_operations.description: Create syllabus tracker page that fetches and displays all user chapters using React Query. Display each chapter with name, status badge (sage for completed, terracotta for pending), and study time formatted with timeFormatters utility. Include empty state when no chapters exist. Use authorization component to ensure only authenticated users can access this page.

Create chapter list item component that displays individual chapter with name, color-coded status badge (sage green for Completed, terracotta for Pending), and formatted study time using timeFormatters utility. Component should match existing warm earth tone design theme.
Add route for SyllabusTrackerPage at path '/syllabus' within the authenticated layout routes. Ensure route follows existing authentication and profile setup redirect pattern.
Add navigation link to Syllabus Tracker page in header navigation. Place link between Dashboard and logout button for logical flow. Style consistently with existing header design.

requirements.summary: Add form to create new chapters with name input and submit button
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes text input for chapter name
Submit button creates new chapter with Pending status
Form validates name is not empty before submission
Chapter list updates immediately after successful creation
Form clears after successful submission

file_operations.description: Add chapter creation form with text input and submit button. Implement validation to ensure name is not empty. Use React Query mutation to call backend addChapter method. Clear form and invalidate chapter list query after successful submission to update UI immediately.

Add useAddChapter mutation hook that calls backend addChapter method and invalidates chapter queries plus dashboard queries (progress, stats, total time) on success for immediate UI updates across all components.

requirements.summary: Add status toggle functionality to switch chapters between Pending and Completed states
acceptanceCriteria: Each chapter has a clickable status badge or toggle control
Clicking toggles status between Pending and Completed
UI updates immediately to reflect new status
Status change persists to backend

file_operations.description: Add onClick handler to status badge that toggles chapter status between Pending and Completed. Use React Query mutation to call backend updateChapterStatus method. Update UI optimistically and invalidate chapter queries after successful mutation to reflect changes across dashboard and tracker.
Add useUpdateChapterStatus mutation hook that calls backend updateChapterStatus method and invalidates chapter queries plus dashboard queries (progress, stats) on success for immediate UI updates.

requirements.summary: Create study timer component with Start/Stop buttons displaying elapsed time in MM:SS format
acceptanceCriteria: Timer displays elapsed time in MM:SS format
Start button begins timer and changes to Stop button
Stop button pauses timer and resets button to Start
Timer continues counting while active
Timer resets when stopped

file_operations.description: Create study timer component with Start/Stop toggle button. Use React state and useEffect with setInterval to track elapsed seconds. Display time in MM:SS format. Start button begins timer and changes label to Stop. Stop button pauses timer, resets elapsed time to zero, and changes label back to Start. Style with warm earth tone theme.

requirements.summary: Add chapter selection to study timer and save accumulated time to selected chapter when timer stops
acceptanceCriteria: Timer component includes dropdown or selector to choose a chapter
Timer cannot start without selecting a chapter
When timer stops, elapsed time is added to selected chapter's study time
Chapter's study time updates in backend and reflects in UI
Timer resets after saving time to chapter

file_operations.description: Add chapter selection dropdown that fetches user chapters. Disable Start button when no chapter is selected. When Stop is clicked, convert elapsed seconds to minutes and use React Query mutation to call backend addStudyTimeToChapter method with selected chapter name and calculated minutes. Invalidate chapter queries and dashboard queries after successful save to update all displays. Reset timer and clear selection after save.
Add StudyTimer component to syllabus tracker page, positioned above or alongside chapter list for easy access during study sessions.
Add useAddStudyTime mutation hook that calls backend addStudyTimeToChapter method and invalidates chapter queries plus dashboard queries (total time, stats) on success for immediate UI updates.

requirements.summary: Add daily study goal setting functionality with input field and progress indicator
acceptanceCriteria: Input field exists to set daily study goal in minutes
Daily goal persists in user profile
Study timer shows progress toward daily goal
Visual indicator shows when daily goal is reached

file_operations.description: Create study goal card component with input field to set daily study goal in minutes. Fetch current goal using React Query from backend getDailyStudyGoal method. Use mutation to call backend setDailyStudyGoal method when user updates goal. Display progress bar showing total study time vs daily goal, with visual indicator (color change or checkmark) when goal is reached. Style with warm earth tones.
Add StudyGoalCard component to syllabus tracker page, positioned near StudyTimer for contextual awareness of daily progress.

Add useGetDailyGoal query hook that calls backend getDailyStudyGoal method and useSetDailyGoal mutation hook that calls backend setDailyStudyGoal method. Mutation should invalidate daily goal query on success.

requirements.summary: Update dashboard progress calculation to use real chapter data (completed/total × 100)
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard progress percentage reflects real chapter completion data
Progress is 0% when no chapters exist
Progress is 100% when all chapters are completed
Progress updates immediately when chapter status changes

file_operations.description: Replace mock data in useGetDashboardProgress hook with actual backend call to getDashboardProgress method. Ensure query is invalidated when chapter status changes so progress updates immediately.

requirements.summary: Update dashboard chapter statistics to display actual counts from user's chapters
acceptanceCriteria: ChapterStatsCard displays real completed chapter count
ChapterStatsCard displays real pending chapter count
Total chapter count equals completed + pending
Counts update immediately when chapters are added or status changes

file_operations.description: Replace mock data in useGetChapterStats hook with actual backend call to getChapterStats method which returns [total, completed, pending] tuple. Ensure query is invalidated when chapters are added or status changes so counts update immediately.

requirements.summary: Update dashboard study time display to show sum of all chapter study times
acceptanceCriteria: StudyTimeCard displays total minutes accumulated across all chapters
Time is formatted using existing timeFormatters utility
Study time updates when timer adds time to any chapter
Study time is 0 when user has no chapters or no recorded time

file_operations.description: Replace mock data in useGetTotalStudyTime hook with actual backend call to getTotalStudyTime method. Ensure query is invalidated when study time is added to any chapter so StudyTimeCard updates immediately. Time continues to be formatted with existing timeFormatters utility in StudyTimeCard component.
